methods.name: function loadStyle(url: string): Promise<HTMLLinkElement>
methods.description: Loads a Cascading Style Sheets (CSS) file by creating a link tag and appending it to the DOM.

parameters.name: url
parameters.description: The URL of the Cascading Style Sheets (CSS) file.

returns.description: Returns a Promise that resolves to the link element upon success.

methods.remarks: The <mark>loadStyle</mark> function includes a built-in cache; subsequent calls return the same link element.
